description_long: This object is a cylindrical perfume spray bottle with a dark, glossy finish and a removable cap. The bottle is mounted on a round, tan-colored base, which provides stability and a display-like appearance. The label features a stylized graphic with a partial face and bold text, as well as a barcode and safety icon on the back. The cap is a simple, smooth cylinder in a dark brown color, matching the bottle's upper section. The spray nozzle is visible when the cap is removed, and the top of the bottle is labeled with 'DARK BROWN.' The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal decorative elements aside from the label graphics.
description: A dark, cylindrical perfume spray bottle with a removable cap, mounted on a tan round base and featuring a modern label design.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at an angle, showing the dark cap removed and the spray nozzle exposed, with the label's graphic and text partially visible.
description_view_1: A direct front view reveals the main label with bold text and a stylized graphic, as well as the cap hovering above the nozzle.
description_view_2: The back view displays the label's fine print, a barcode, and a safety icon, with the cap still removed and the tan base visible.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective highlights the round spray nozzle, the 'DARK BROWN' text on the top, and the overall cylindrical shape.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized, abstract logo resembling a partial face or mask in white and purple, located on the front label above the main text.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is a smooth, cylindrical shape in dark brown plastic, slightly rounded at the top, and fully removable to reveal the spray nozzle. It has a glossy finish and no visible decorative features.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The bottle has a classic cylindrical silhouette with a straight body, rounded shoulders, and a flat base, topped with a slightly domed removable cap.
attribute_decorative_elements: The only decorative element is the stylized graphic on the front label, which features an abstract face or mask in white and purple tones.
